title: RealClaw Skill Manifest (SKILL.md frontmatter)
description: Canonical metadata for a RealClaw-packaged Concierge skill. Lives in the YAML frontmatter of SKILL.md. Runtime gate: packages/skill-mantle-agent/scripts/validate-manifest.ts.

name.description: Skill ID. kebab-case; unique within the RealClaw registry.

description.description: One-paragraph user-facing summary. Appears in skill registry listings.

version.description: Semver MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. Pre-release tags (e.g. 0.1.0-rc.1) NOT supported by the registry today.

license.description: Mantle-ecosystem norm. Other licenses require an audit conversation before listing.

mcp_server_url.description: Production MCP endpoint clients talk to. Streamable-HTTP per ADR-011 (story-133).

oauth_client_id.description: OAuth client ID registered with concierge.xyz's OAuth server (story-134). MCP clients use it to start the OAuth flow on 401.

supported_chains.description: EVM chain IDs the agent operates on. Mantle Mainnet = 5000, Mantle Sepolia = 5003.

permission.description: OAuth scope required to invoke. MUST appear in top-level `permissions`.

permissions.description: OAuth scopes the skill requests at install time. Per tool, see tools[].permission.
